city_report.transport: From Schiphol Airport. The train station is located directly beneath the airport. From the arrivals hall, walk through Schiphol Plaza to reach the train station.

attraction.name: Rijksmuseum
attraction.description: National museum dedicated to Dutch arts and history.

attraction.name: Anne Frank House
attraction.description: Historic house where Anne Frank hid during WWII.

attraction.name: Van Gogh Museum
attraction.description: World's largest collection of artworks by Vincent van Gogh.

attraction.name: Vondelpark
attraction.description: The city's most famous and largest public park.

attraction.name: Dam Square
attraction.description: The historic center of Amsterdam and site of the Royal Palace.

attraction.name: Heineken Experience
attraction.description: Interactive museum in the former brewery of the pilsner brand.

attraction.name: Stedelijk Museum
attraction.description: Major museum for modern and contemporary art and design.

attraction.name: Rembrandt House
attraction.description: The former home and workshop of the painter Rembrandt.

attraction.name: A'DAM Lookout
attraction.description: Observation deck with a 360-degree view of the city.

attraction.name: Jordaan District
attraction.description: Charming neighborhood known for its narrow canals and boutiques.

city_report.description: Hub globale dell'innovazione sostenibile, Amsterdam eccelle nella mobilità ciclistica e nella gestione creativa degli spazi acquatici. Unisce un dinamismo economico unico a una rete di sicurezza sociale e urbana di primo livello.
city_report.wiki_intro:
'''[http://www.zuidoost.amsterdam.nl/ Zuidoost]''' (Dutch phrasebook|Dutch for ''Southeast''), often colloquially referred to as the '''Bijlmer''', is a borough of Amsterdam. It is an exclave, separated from the mainland by Duivendrecht and Diemen.
==Understand==
With no shared borders with Amsterdam, Zuidoost is a separate entity. It was built up in the 1960s and 70s as a residential utopia of...
